scenarios: features/seat-write-scope.feature:The Captain may not write verification support through the session write seam
features/seat-write-scope.feature:The Captain may write the rigging through the session write seam
features/seat-write-scope.feature:The Captain may write production code through the session write seam
features/live-crew.feature:The handed-off Crew session may write the shim package's production code
features/live-crew.feature:The handed-off Crew session may write the launch bin
features/methodology-conformance.feature:Every role dispatch prompt is served from the agent-prompt catalog
features/methodology-conformance.feature:The upstream Shipshape package is cloned once for the whole run
